samples.xml_description:
<module id="signal_generator">
    <description>Triangle Wave signal generator.</description>
    <ports>
        <input id="clk">Clock signal.</input>
        <input id="rst_n">Active-low reset signal. Defined as 0 for reset, 1 for reset signal inactive.</input>
        
        <output id="wave" width_description="[4:0]">5-bit output waveform signal representing the generated waveform.</output>
    </ports>
    <parameter_description>
        <param id="0">State 0: Increment waveform.</param>
        <param id="1">State 1: Decrement waveform.</param>
    </parameter_description>
    <implementation>Reset state and waveform. State determines incremental and decremental phases of waveform.</implementation>
</module>
